name: Phemex Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency spot and derivatives exchange REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders to access spot trading, perpetual swaps, and futures with up to 100x leverage, with HMAC-SHA256 authentication, real-time WebSocket streaming, testnet environment, and zero-fee spot trading for premium members.
use_cases: Trading perpetual swaps via Phemex REST API for leveraged cryptocurrency strategies
Streaming real-time market data via Phemex WebSocket for algorithmic trading bots
Accessing zero-fee spot trading via Phemex API for high-frequency spot strategies
Managing margin positions via Phemex API for cross/isolated margin trading automation
Testing strategies safely via Phemex Testnet API before deploying with real funds
not_for: US users (Phemex restricted from US markets — use Coinbase or Kraken)
Institutional custody with regulatory reporting requirements
Complex options trading (Phemex focuses on perpetuals/futures, not options)
best_when: A non-US retail or professional trader needs a modern exchange with zero-fee spot trading (premium), up to 100x leverage on perpetuals, and a clean REST/WebSocket API.
avoid_when: You're in the US (restricted), need options, require institutional custody, or need regulatory compliance.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. x-phemex-access-token header (API key). x-phemex-request-signature header (HMAC signature). x-phemex-request-expiry header (Unix timestamp + 60-second expiry). Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of path + query_string + expiry + request_body. No OAuth2. WebSocket: authenticate via request message. Testnet: testnet-api.phemex.com.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: standard fee schedule; spot maker 0.1% / taker 0.1%
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium membership ($69.99/year): zero-fee spot trading up to $500K/month
pricing.notes: Singapore incorporated. Founded 2019 (Jack Tao, former Morgan Stanley VP). Younger exchange — strong UX focus. Premium membership: zero-fee spot trading (major differentiator). Perpetuals: up to 100x leverage. USD-settled perpetuals (no coin-margined). Cross and isolated margin modes. Spot and derivatives sub-accounts. Mobile-first design. US restricted. Testnet available at testnet-api.phemex.com. PT (Phemex Token) for fee discounts. Earn: yield products. API documentation well-organized on GitHub.

performance.rate_limits: 500 requests/minute for REST; no documented WebSocket limit

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA256 with 60-second expiry. Testnet available. US restricted. Singapore. Zero-fee spot (premium). 500 req/min. Good GitHub API docs. Founded 2019 — relatively new.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order reads idempotent by order ID. clOrdID for client order deduplication. Cancel idempotent by orderID. 60-second expiry on signatures provides replay protection.
known_agent_gotchas: x-phemex-request-expiry: current Unix timestamp + 60 seconds (not 5 seconds like BitMEX)
Testnet at testnet-api.phemex.com — separate API keys from mainnet
US restricted — verify jurisdiction before building Phemex integrations
Zero-fee spot requires Premium membership ($69.99/year) — standard plan has fees
Sub-account structure: spot and derivatives are separate accounts with separate balances
Price format: prices are integers × scale factor (e.g., BTC price: 4000000 = $40,000.00)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 with 60-second expiry (replay protection). Singapore regulation. US restricted. 100x leverage creates liquidation risk. Cryptocurrency financial data — high value target. Testnet for safe dev/test. No OAuth2. Clean API design from newer exchange.
